_comment: Flora species record (the Elements). `art` maps lifecycle stage -> billboard texture; missing stages fall back to `grow` (labeled placeholder — her painted stage variants drop into these same slots). `biomes` maps biome id -> scatter weight (composition within a cell; data/world/biomes.json `flora` stays the master density). `weight_default` is used where no biome map answers. `moisture_need`: weight fades to zero as local ground moisture falls this far below the need.
name: Arch Tree
